name: 宁波
description: Ningbo, an ancient port city in Zhejiang province, is one of China's oldest cities and major ports. Known for its thousand-year history, Buddhist temples, traditional architecture, and fresh seafood. Home to the famous Tianyi Pavilion, China's oldest private library.
highlights: Tianyi Pavilion - China's oldest private library

climate.tips: Best in spring and autumn. Summers hot and humid with typhoons possible. Pleasant winters. Spring for flowers, autumn for foliage.

attractions.name: 天一阁
attractions.description: China's oldest private library, built in 1561, with beautiful gardens.
attractions.tips: Arrive early to avoid crowds. The gardens are beautiful. Audio guide recommended.

attractions.name: 天童寺
attractions.description: Ancient Buddhist temple founded in 300 AD, one of the most important in China.
attractions.tips: Take bus 622 or 629. Arrive early. Great for hiking in the area.

attractions.name: 宁波老外滩
attractions.description: Historic waterfront area with European colonial architecture from 1800s.
attractions.tips: Best at night when illuminated. Enjoy river cruise. Explore bars and cafes.

attractions.name: 东钱湖
attractions.description: Scenic lake area with temples, gardens and beautiful mountain scenery.
attractions.tips: Rent bike to tour the lake. Combine with nearby temples. Stay for sunset.

attractions.name: 雪窦山
attractions.description: Sacred Buddhist mountain with temples and the world's largest弥勒大佛.
attractions.tips: Take tourist bus from city. Wear comfortable shoes. Full day trip.

attractions.name: 宁波博物馆
attractions.description: Modern museum with local history exhibits and unique architecture.
attractions.tips: The building architecture is unique. Allow 2 hours. Audio guide available.

attractions.name: 月湖
attractions.description: Historic urban lake with classical gardens and traditional buildings.
attractions.tips: Beautiful in early morning. Combine with Tianyi Pavilion nearby.

attractions.name: 鼓楼
attractions.description: Historic drum tower and traditional shopping street.
attractions.tips: Shop for local products. Try Ningbo snacks. Best in evening.

attractions.name: 阿育王寺
attractions.description: Ancient temple housing a relic of Buddha, founded in 4th century.
attractions.tips: One of China's oldest temples. Take bus 721 or 758. Very peaceful.

attractions.name: 象山影视城
attractions.description: Film set complex where many Chinese TV dramas are filmed.
attractions.tips: Check show schedule. Rent costumes for photos. Full day attraction.

attractions.name: 南塘老街
attractions.description: Restored historic street with traditional architecture and local snacks.
attractions.tips: Try local snacks. Buy souvenirs. Best in evening with lighting.

attractions.name: 宁波海洋世界
attractions.description: Large aquarium with marine life and dolphin shows.
attractions.tips: Arrive for dolphin show. Great for families. Book tickets online.

attractions.name: 招宝山
attractions.description: Historic mountain with ancient fortifications and coastal views.
attractions.tips: Take bus 541 or 371. Great for history buffs. Combine with nearby beach.

attractions.name: 庆安会馆
attractions.description: Historic guild hall for sailors and merchants with elaborate carvings.
attractions.tips: The carvings are impressive. Learn about maritime trade history.

attractions.name: 它山堰
attractions.description: Ancient water conservation project from Tang Dynasty, still in use.
attractions.tips: For engineering enthusiasts. Combine with nearby hiking. Very peaceful.

attractions.name: 梁祝公园
attractions.description: Theme park based on the famous Chinese legend of the Butterfly Lovers.
attractions.tips: Check for performances. Great for couples. Learn about Chinese legend.

attractions.name: 宁波美术馆
attractions.description: Modern art museum in a historic building with rotating exhibitions.
attractions.tips: Check current exhibitions. Combine with Old Bund visit.

attractions.name: 福泉山
attractions.description: Mountain tea plantation with panoramic views of Dongqian Lake.
attractions.tips: Come for sunrise. The tea is famous. Great hiking in the area.

attractions.name: 沙孟海书院
attractions.description: Historic academy and former residence of famous calligrapher.
attractions.tips: For calligraphy lovers. The gardens are peaceful.

attractions.name: 前童古镇
attractions.description: Preserved ancient water town with traditional Ming and Qing architecture.
attractions.tips: Less crowded than other water towns. Authentic experience. Half day trip.

attractions.name: 宁波科技馆
attractions.description: Modern interactive science museum with many hands-on exhibits.
attractions.tips: Great for families. Allow 3-4 hours. Buy tickets online.

attractions.name: 城隍庙
attractions.description: Historic temple dedicated to the city god with traditional buildings.
attractions.tips: Near Tianyi Pavilion. Experience local worship culture.

attractions.name: 三江口
attractions.description: Confluence of three rivers with modern skyline views.
attractions.tips: Best at night. Take river cruise. Great photo opportunities.

attractions.name: 宁波动物园
attractions.description: Large zoo with pandas and variety of animals in natural setting.
attractions.tips: Arrive early for pandas. Take观光车. Great for families.

attractions.name: 天一阁
attractions.description: 中国现存最早的私家藏书楼，有450多年历史。

attractions.name: 老外滩

attractions.name: 宁波服装博物馆

restaurants.name: 宁海麦虾汤

restaurants.name: 臭菜

arrival.tips: Airport 15km from city center. Airport bus (12¥) or taxi (80¥) to city.

arrival.to: Ningbo Railway Station / Ningbo East Station
arrival.tips: High-speed train from Shanghai and Hangzhou is convenient. Both stations have metro.

hotels.name: 宁波泛太平洋酒店

hotels.name: 宁波东钱湖希尔顿酒店

hotels.name: 宁波南塘客栈

hotels.name: 宁波华侨豪生大酒店

hotels.name: 宁波月湖酒店

hotels.name: 宁波象山海鲜民宿

culturalTips.title: Ancient Port City
culturalTips.content: Ningbo is one of China's oldest port cities, dating back over 1,000 years. It was a major stop on the Maritime Silk Road and remains an important port today.

culturalTips.title: Tianyi Pavilion
culturalTips.content: The Tianyi Pavilion is China's oldest private library, built in 1561. The name means 'First under Heaven' and it houses rare books and classical gardens.

culturalTips.title: Ningbo Cuisine
culturalTips.content: Ningbo cuisine is known for its sweet and savory flavors. Must-try: soup dumplings (汤团), rice cakes (年糕), and the famous stinky vegetable (臭菜).

culturalTips.title: Buddhist Heritage
culturalTips.content: Ningbo is an important Buddhist center with ancient temples like Tiantong Temple and Ayuwang Temple that date back over 1,700 years.

culturalTips.title: Water Towns
culturalTips.content: The area around Ningbo has several ancient water towns like Qiantong that offer a glimpse of traditional Chinese life along canals.

culturalTips.title: Fresh Seafood
culturalTips.content: Being a coastal city, Ningbo is famous for fresh seafood. The Dongqian Lake area has famous 'boat cuisine' with fish caught from the lake.

culturalTips.title: Colonial Architecture
culturalTips.content: The Old Bund shows European colonial influence from the 1800s when Ningbo was a treaty port. The architecture blends Chinese and Western styles.

culturalTips.title: Tea Culture
culturalTips.content: Ningbo has famous green tea plantations on Fuquan Mountain overlooking Dongqian Lake. Tea picking and tasting can be combined with hiking.

culturalTips.title: Butterfly Lovers
culturalTips.content: The famous Chinese legend 'Butterfly Lovers' (梁祝) is set in the Ningbo area. The Liangshanbo Park tells this romantic story.

culturalTips.title: Ningbo Dialect
culturalTips.content: Ningbo dialect is a distinct Wu Chinese dialect, different from Mandarin. It preserves ancient Chinese pronunciation features valued by linguists.

culturalTips.title: Business Hub
culturalTips.content: Ningbo is a major commercial hub with busy ports. The city has thriving trade and manufacturing industries.

culturalTips.title: Dongqian Lake
culturalTips.content: Dongqian Lake is one of Zhejiang's most beautiful lakes with scenic bike paths, gardens, and temples to explore. Rent a bike to tour the lake.

culturalTips.title: Calligraphy Heritage
culturalTips.content: Ningbo has produced many famous calligraphers. The Shamenghai Academy honors the famous calligrapher and offers cultural exhibits.

culturalTips.title: Buddhist Mountains
culturalTips.content: Xuedou Mountain is a sacred Buddhist mountain with the world's largest Maitreya Buddha statue. Combined with hiking and temple visits.

culturalTips.title: Famous Snacks
culturalTips.content: Ningbo has many famous snacks: oil-fried dough twists (油赞子), rice cakes (年糕), and sweet rice dumplings (汤团) are must-tries.

culturalTips.title: Traditional Crafts
culturalTips.content: Look for traditional Ningbo crafts like Zhoushan wood carving and local embroidery as souvenirs from the area.
